title: eupatorium subglabratum
intro: Eupatorium subglabratum, also known as White Snakeroot, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family. Traditionally, White Snakeroot has been used in herbal medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and supporting the immune system. White Snakeroot can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or topical salve, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
